name: Easy Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground beef and chopped onion until fully cooked.
2. Drain excess fat, then stir in spaghetti sauce, parsley, and oregano.
3. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally, and keep warm over low heat.
4. In a separate bowl, mix creamed cottage cheese, Parmesan cheese, milk, remaining parsley flakes, basil, shredded zucchini, and shredded mozzarella until well combined.
5. Spread half of the dough evenly in an ungreased 19 x 9 pan.
6. Sprinkle half of the shredded zucchini and half of the meat mixture over the dough.
7. Top with half of the shredded mozzarella.
8. Add the remaining dough in small spoonfuls, alternating layers of dough, zucchini, meat, and cheese.
9. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30 to 35 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Allow to stand for 10 minutes before cutting.
